name: lora-trainer
description: LoRA/QLoRA fine-tuning assistant — data analysis, VRAM estimation, hyperparameter recommendation, and training script generation. Standalone CLI + Claude Code / Cursor / Codex skill. Supports 40+ models across 12 families.
author: LuVisage

scripts.test: python -c "from scripts.analyzer import quick_analyze; from scripts.memory_calc import quick_calc; from scripts.lora_advisor import quick_recommend; from cli.main import main; r = quick_analyze('examples/sample_data.jsonl'); m = quick_calc('qwen2-7b'); c = quick_recommend(r['length']['total_samples'], '7b', 'chat'); print('✅ All modules + CLI OK')"
